ops.title: cc-notes' hook pack is now multi-file; sibling modules MUST use relative imports (from .common import) — capt-hook's discover_pack loads each file as a submodule, so bare imports raise ModuleNotFoundError
ops.body:
The cc-notes capt-hook pack (`plugin/hooks/`) was split from one `cc_notes.py` into
`common.py` (leaf: shared helpers/conditions/record vocab) + `session.py` / `surface.py`
/ `record.py` / `memory.py` / `workflow.py`, plus an empty `__init__.py`.

Cross-module imports **must be relative**: `from .common import run_cc_notes`. A bare
`from common import ...` raises `ModuleNotFoundError` under the production loader —
capt-hook's `discover_pack` (captain-hook `captain_hook/loader.py`) synthesizes a package
`captain_hook._packs.cc_notes` with `__path__=[pack_dir]` and loads each top-level `*.py`
as a submodule; the pack dir is never on `sys.path`. The `--hooks` dev/test path
(`discover_hooks`) puts `plugin/` on `sys.path` and imports as the `hooks` package, so
`tests/test_cc_notes.py` imports siblings package-qualified (`from hooks.common import …`).

Verify any change to the split two ways: `uvx capt-hook --hooks plugin/hooks test` (inline
tests + load under discover_hooks) and `uv run plugin/hooks/tests/test_cc_notes.py`
(the stateful proofs, incl. `test_pack_loads_under_discover_pack`, which drives the real
discover_pack path — the truest guard for the relative-import wiring). The local bare
`python` is 2.7 and chokes on `from __future__ import annotations`; use python3 / uv.

Adding a side-effect handler (it runs the CLI itself instead of nudging) follows the
`mirror_memory_to_note` template and the new `do_sync`/`auto_sync`/`auto_reconcile` in
`workflow.py`: deterministic, idempotent, fail-closed. Its *firing* path can't be proven
by an inline `tests={}` (the inline harness stubs `call_llm` but NOT `call_cli`/`git`, so
a firing inline test would shell out for real) — keep inline tests to `Allow()` near-misses
and put firing/side-effect proofs in `tests/test_cc_notes.py` with a stubbed CLI. Relates
to [[capt-hook-is-cc-notes-hooks-upstream]] and [[cc-notes-hooks-inline-test-constraint]].
